main.description: Get details for a space. Must be called on the space owner's PDS. Returns the space URI and ownership, plus an open-union `config` carrying host-implementation-specific configuration (e.g. com.atproto.simplespace.defs#spaceConfig). Clients that don't recognize the config variant should ignore it.

isOwner.description: Whether the authenticated user is the owner of the space.

config.description: Host-implementation-specific configuration for the space. Open union: a host surfaces its own config variant, and clients ignore variants they don't recognize.
